summary: Live-applied ADR 0289 from the latest synchronized origin/main lineage by converging Directus on docker-runtime-lv3 as the repo-managed REST and GraphQL operational data API, backing it with a dedicated PostgreSQL database on postgres-lv3, delegating routine browser sign-in to Keycloak, publishing data.example.com through the shared NGINX edge, and replaying the bootstrap, access-model, Docker recovery, and shared edge publication fixes until the end-to-end public verification contract passed.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest pytest -q tests/test_directus_playbook.py tests/test_directus_bootstrap.py tests/test_directus_runtime_role.py tests/test_directus_postgres_role.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py tests/test_compose_runtime_secret_injection.py tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_plausible_playbook.py` returned `51 passed in 1.26s` after the bootstrap, access-model, and shared-edge bootstrap fixes landed.

verification.check: Directus preflight and repository validation paths
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-directus`, `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-directus`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, and `make validate-generated-portals` all passed on the synchronized worktree. The Directus preflight now proves the `shared-edge-generated-portals` bootstrap manifest by requiring the generated `ops-portal`, `changelog-portal`, and `docs-portal` directories before publication.

`make converge-directus env=production` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=274 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=88 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=70 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=23 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=40 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=6 rescued=0 ignored=0`, and `localhost : ok=23 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

A fresh ad hoc probe through the repo-managed Proxmox host jump path showed `directus` and `directus-openbao-agent` both `Up`, with the Directus container published on `10.10.10.20:8055` and `127.0.0.1:8055`. A second guest-local probe returned `{"status":"ok"}` from `/server/health` and `pong` from `/server/ping`.

verification.check: Public Directus publication, REST, GraphQL, and OIDC contract
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/directus_bootstrap.py verify-public --base-url https://data.example.com --api-token-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/directus/service-registry-token.txt --collection service_registry --expected-service-name directus --expected-sso-host sso.example.com --openapi-output receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-openapi.json` returned `{"status": "ok", "collection": "service_registry", "service_name": "directus", "rest_items": 1, "graphql_items": 1}`. Public health also returned `{"status":"ok"}`, and `data.example.com` resolved to `203.0.113.1`.

notes: This receipt records the branch-local latest-main live-apply proof before the protected integration surfaces on exact main are updated.

A manual Hetzner DNS bridge was required during the provider brownout window: `data.example.com` was created manually as `203.0.113.1` with provider record id `644d501af8a99d37d91f388ac4585349`, after which later governed replays observed the canonical state.

The Directus correction loop fixed bootstrap script path resolution and change detection, ensured the access-model SQL seed is rendered with `postgres` ownership and quoted `directus_access."user"`, verified the Docker nat chain after recovery before Directus startup, and taught `converge-directus` plus the workflow catalog preflight to build the shared generated edge portals before the NGINX publication role republishes them.

The branch-local `make validate-generated-docs` check remains intentionally deferred because it regenerates the protected top-level `README.md` status fragments. The exact-main integration step still needs to refresh that surface, bump `VERSION`, update `changelog.md`, update `versions/stack.yaml`, rerun the live apply from `main`, and then record the mainline receipt.

correction_loop.surface: Directus bootstrap, access-model seeding, Docker recovery gating, and shared edge publication bootstrap
correction_loop.repair_action: Exposed the Hetzner brownout error path clearly, bridged the missing `data.example.com` record manually when the provider window blocked automation, corrected Directus bootstrap invocation and change detection, fixed the PostgreSQL seed-file ownership and reserved-column quoting, added a final nat-chain verification after Docker recovery, and regenerated the shared edge portal artifacts before NGINX publication.
correction_loop.verification: Reran the focused pytest suite, Directus preflight, repository validation, and the full governed `make converge-directus env=production` replay, then confirmed local health, public health, and public REST plus GraphQL reads with the repo-managed service token.
